stories.title: 2026 NBA Draft First-Round Recap — Michigan Makes History

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: AJ Dybantsa goes No. 1 to Washington. Peterson No. 2 Jazz. Boozer No. 3 Memphis. The 2026 NBA Draft is done — and the class looks LOADED. Freshmen dominated the Top 9. Summer League just became must-watch TV. #NBADraft #HoopHeroes

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Michigan just made history. Three lottery picks in one draft — Morez Johnson (No. 9 Dallas), Yaxel Lendeborg (No. 11 Golden State), Aday Mara (No. 12 OKC). Never been done in Wolverines history. Dusty May left campus. His players followed him to the league. #NBADraft #HoopHeroes

article.headline: 2026 NBA Draft Recap: Michigan Makes Lottery History as Dybantsa Goes No. 1 to Washington

stories.title: NBA Free Agency Opens in 3 Days — The Countdown Is On

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text: 3 days until NBA free agency. KAT deciding on a $272M extension. LeBron's future uncertain at 41. Harden's option deadline Sunday. Giannis officially a Miami Heat player in 9 days. This is the most consequential offseason in years. #NBA #HoopHeroes

article.headline: NBA Free Agency Opens in 3 Days: KAT's Sacrifice, LeBron's Future, and the Decisions That Will Define This Era

stories.title: Giannis to Heat — 9 Days to July 6

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: 9 days until Giannis officially becomes a Miami Heat. The trade cost Miami 3 unprotected 1sts, 1 swap, Herro, Ware, Jaquez and Jakucionis. The East has never looked like this. #HeatNation #HoopHeroes

stories.title: Knicks Draft Night — New York's Second Act Begins

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Knicks made their picks. Now the real work starts. KAT eligible for $272M. Mitchell Robinson a free agent. Dolan says no second apron. Brunson took $113M less and won Finals MVP. KAT's turn to make the call. #NewYorkKnicks #HoopHeroes

stories.title: Jaylen Brown Trade Rumors Heat Up in Boston

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Jaylen Brown has NOT asked out of Boston. But the Celtics are actively engaged in trade talks — and the asking price is 4 unprotected 1sts. Brown hasn't blinked. Has Boston? This offseason just got a lot more interesting. #Celtics #HoopHeroes

article.headline: Jaylen Brown Hasn't Asked Out — But the Celtics Are Already Working the Phones
